company.what_they_do: RedCentric (redcentric.site) presents itself as a professional recruitment and staffing solutions agency operating worldwide, with a stated focus on 'strategic hiring for long-term business growth.' The website is extremely thin — only a homepage with a tagline is publicly visible; no about page, team page, service details, client list, or sector focus was found. NOTE: This entity is distinct from the well-known UK IT managed services provider 'Redcentric PLC' (redcentricplc.com), which is a publicly listed company. The two share a name but are separate organisations.
company.raw_notes:
- Domain: redcentric.site (not redcentricplc.com — different company entirely)
- Homepage title: 'RedCentric | Recruitment Agency'
- Tagline: 'Professional Recruitment & Staffing Solutions Worldwide' and 'Strategic hiring for long-term business growth'
- No sub-pages, team members, service lines, sector focus, pricing, case studies, or founding story found publicly
- Website appears very new or minimally built — likely a small/early-stage or boutique agency
- The well-known 'Redcentric PLC' (redcentricplc.com) is a UK MSP founded 1997/demerged 2013, listed on London Stock Exchange (LON:RCN), headquartered in Harrogate — entirely unrelated to this signup
- No news, press, or third-party mentions of redcentric.site found
- Email prefix 'admamjames' is likely a typo/portmanteau of 'admin' + 'james', suggesting an administrative or owner-operator role

individual.name: James
individual.notes: No publicly findable individual named 'James' is associated with redcentric.site specifically. The email address 'admamjames@redcentric.site' uses the prefix 'admamjames' — likely a concatenation of 'admin' and 'james' (possibly a typo of 'adminJames'), which may suggest this person is an admin user, owner, or operator of the agency rather than a distinct named employee. No LinkedIn profile, team page, or press mention ties a 'James' to this specific domain or company. The James Purcell found in search results is an Operations Manager at the unrelated Redcentric PLC (redcentricplc.com) — not this company.

could_not_find: No about page, team page, or service detail pages found on redcentric.site — website is effectively a single-page placeholder
